## Type of Change

- [ ] feat — New feature
- [ ] fix — Bug fix
- [ ] docs — Documentation
- [ ] refactor — Code refactoring
- [ ] test — Testing
- [ ] chore — Maintenance
- [ ] perf — Performance
- [ ] style — Formatting

## Quality Checklist

- [ ] Build passes (`npm run build`)
- [ ] TypeScript passes (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] ESLint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Formatting passes (`npm run format:check`)
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] No new warnings introduced
